current_behavior: Code-audit inventories still cover the broad repo, but grep-style reports now default to focused source/tooling scans.
cost_or_risk: Full all-scope reports can still be hard to triage when explicitly requested.
suggested_optimization: Add more named scopes only if future report consumers need them.
evidence_needed: Compare focused and all-scope report size when needed.

current_behavior: src and Program/src duplicate many dry-run/build surfaces.
cost_or_risk: Future source fixes can still be applied to one snapshot and missed in the other, though current mirrored safety edits now have parity-marker checks.
suggested_optimization: Choose an authoritative source snapshot or document a sync workflow that keeps the parity guard current.
evidence_needed: Build/provenance proof for the chosen snapshot plus passing source snapshot parity checks.

current_behavior: Image lookup path construction happens per id/version and cache keys are strings.
cost_or_risk: Repeated string formatting and filesystem lookups may be noticeable with large art sets.
suggested_optimization: Cache resolved art path/version metadata after Cards.dat load.
evidence_needed: Profile card-art lookup under Deck/Magic UI.

current_behavior: Frame/config parsing uses repeated INI reads and path formatting.
cost_or_risk: Startup and card-render path can repeat file/config work.
suggested_optimization: Keep parsed config/path data in a bounded cache with invalidation only on config reload.
evidence_needed: Measure startup/render time before and after.

current_behavior: Deck file listing builds paths with repeated sprintf and filesystem scans.
cost_or_risk: Large PlayDeck trees may make deck dialogs slow.
suggested_optimization: Cache directory listings during one dialog/session and invalidate after save/delete.
evidence_needed: Measure deck dialog open time with large deck tree.

current_behavior: Draft mode writes and rereads packs/picks files by relative path; failed output opens are now guarded.
cost_or_risk: Unnecessary disk churn and runtime-folder clutter remain.
suggested_optimization: Route generated draft artifacts to a configured local output directory after draft-mode behavior is proven in a disposable copy.
evidence_needed: Manual draft-mode test in disposable copy.

current_behavior: The audit helper now has focused scans; duplicate and branch-delta scans can still traverse large asset trees.
cost_or_risk: Maintenance commands can be slow on 52k+ files.
suggested_optimization: Add documented focused scopes and size-based prefilters to other tools where not already present.

current_behavior: Security target validation rescans hashes after tool edits.
cost_or_risk: Correct but can be slow and invalidates local TSV often.
suggested_optimization: Record a clearer "refresh after tracked scanner-target edit" workflow.
evidence_needed: No code profiling needed; docs/tool usability review.
status: safe to fix now as docs

current_behavior: GDI objects are created/selected in many drawing paths.
cost_or_risk: Repeated object churn and possible leaks can affect long sessions.
suggested_optimization: Audit one drawing module at a time and centralize restore/delete helpers.
evidence_needed: Windows GDI handle monitoring during long deck/duel session.

current_behavior: Many card functions use ad hoc prompt buffer formatting.
cost_or_risk: Maintenance risk and possible buffer bugs.
suggested_optimization: Add small prompt-format helpers only after build/test harness exists.
evidence_needed: Source build plus targeted card prompt regression tests.
